---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for AI SRE Copilot
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm frustrated when I have to manually copy logs..."

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context or mockups of the proposed feature here.
